languages.text: "Да! Прими нашу жертву, Бессмертный, и да начнется пир!"

traits.locale_text: "Да! Прими нашу жертву, Бессмертный, и да начнется пир!"
"Да! Прими нашу жертву, Бессмертный, и да начнется пир!"

languages.text: "Yes! Accept our sacrifice, o Immortal One! May the feast begin."
languages.original_text: "Да! Прими нашу жертву, Бессмертный, и да начнется пир!"

traits.locale_text: "Yes! Accept our sacrifice, o Immortal One! May the feast begin."
"Yes! Accept our sacrifice, o Immortal One! May the feast begin."
"Yes! Accept our sacrifice, o Immortal One! May the feast begin."

languages.text: "Ja! Nimm unser Opfer an, o Unsterblicher! Möge das Fest beginnen."
languages.original_text: "Yes! Accept our sacrifice, o Immortal One! May the feast begin."

languages.text: "Oui ! Accepte notre sacrifice, ô Immortel ! Que le festin commence."
languages.original_text: "Yes! Accept our sacrifice, o Immortal One! May the feast begin."

languages.text: "是的，接受我们的献祭吧，不朽之神愿盛宴开始"
languages.original_text: "Yes! Accept our sacrifice, o Immortal One! May the feast begin."

languages.text: "¡Sí! ¡Acepta nuestro sacrificio, oh Inmortal! Que comience el festín".
languages.original_text: "Yes! Accept our sacrifice, o Immortal One! May the feast begin."

languages.text: 「不滅の神よ、我らの生贄を受け入れよ！宴が始まりますように"
languages.original_text: "Yes! Accept our sacrifice, o Immortal One! May the feast begin."

languages.text: "Evet! Kurbanımızı kabul et, ey Ölümsüz Olan! Şölen başlasın."
languages.original_text: "Yes! Accept our sacrifice, o Immortal One! May the feast begin."
